title: Test Evidence
description: Validates the content of a test-evidence artifact. Records test results against behavior-contract scenarios.

work_unit.description: Common envelope — threads to work unit.

evidence.description: Test result entries, each referencing a behavior-contract scenario.

evidence-entry.description: A single test result for a scenario.

scenario.description: The scenario name from the behavior contract.

output_summary.description: Summary of the command output — proof the test ran.
